rationale: This skill orchestrates Azure pre-deployment validation by reading the existing deployment plan and infrastructure-as-code files (Bicep/Terraform/azure.yaml) and writing validation results back to the plan. The steps explicitly invoke validation commands like `azd provision --preview`, `bicep build`, and `terraform validate`, which spawn those CLIs and reach Azure ARM/Graph endpoints for what-if analysis and RBAC checks. Terraform validate may also contact the Terraform registry for provider metadata. No deletions are implied; the skill only updates the plan file and records proof.
